name: 2Houses
keyWeaknesses: Data hosted in EU/US - not compliant with Australian data sovereignty
No Australian school terms or public holidays
No tamper-proof messaging or SHA-256 hashing
headline: CoRaise vs 2Houses: Built for Australia, Not Europe
description: Compare CoRaise and 2Houses for Australian families. Both offer per-family pricing, but only CoRaise provides Australian data hosting, school terms, and court-ready exports.
whySwitchPoints: Data hosted exclusively in Sydney - 2Houses uses EU/US servers
Australian school terms and state-specific public holidays built in
Tamper-proof messaging with SHA-256 hashing on every message
DV safety features including emergency exit and harassment detection
Comparable pricing with split billing ($120/year vs ~$170/year)

faq.question: How does 2Houses pricing compare to CoRaise?
faq.answer: 2Houses charges approximately $170/year per family with one fee covering both parents. CoRaise's Family plan is $120/year total, and also offers a permanent free tier. Both platforms use a per-family model, but CoRaise is more affordable and includes split billing.

faq.question: Does 2Houses store data in Australia?
faq.answer: No. 2Houses stores data on EU and US servers. CoRaise stores all data exclusively in Sydney, Australia (ap-southeast-2), ensuring compliance with Australian privacy legislation and data sovereignty requirements.

faq.question: Does 2Houses have tamper-proof messaging?
faq.answer: No. 2Houses does not offer tamper-proof messaging or cryptographic integrity verification. CoRaise makes every message immutable after sending and generates a SHA-256 content hash as proof of integrity.

faq.question: Can 2Houses generate court reports for Australian family law?
faq.answer: 2Houses is not positioned as a court-ready platform and does not offer exports designed for Australian courts. CoRaise generates PDF exports compliant with the Evidence Act 1995 (Cth), with SHA-256 verification and a certificate of authenticity.

faq.question: Does 2Houses have Australian school term calendars?
faq.answer: No. 2Houses was built in France and does not include Australian school terms or state-specific public holidays. CoRaise comes pre-loaded with school terms for every Australian state and territory, updated each year.
